payload.text:
# Merge Request

## Source Branch
task/treml-lane-2-20260420T094622

## Target Branch
orch/treml-20260420T094622

## Merge Message
merge: wave 1 lane 2 — TP-181, EXAMPLE-002

## Tasks Completed
- TP-181: Operator Console UX and Information Architecture
- EXAMPLE-002: Parallel Smoke

## File Scope
- `docs/specifications/operator-console/ux-ia.md` (new)
- `docs/specifications/operator-console/view-models.md` (new)
- `docs/specifications/operator-console/interaction-flows.md` (new)
- hello-taskplane-2.md

## Verification Commands

## Result File
result_file: C:/Users/Treml/source/repos/Planely/.pi/merge-result-w1-lane2-treml-20260420T094622.json
Write your JSON result to EXACTLY this path (do NOT modify or convert it): C:/Users/Treml/source/repos/Planely/.pi/merge-result-w1-lane2-treml-20260420T094622.json

## Result JSON Schema (required)
Use EXACT snake_case keys shown below. Do not use camelCase or shortened keys.

```json
{
  "status": "SUCCESS" | "CONFLICT_RESOLVED" | "CONFLICT_UNRESOLVED" | "BUILD_FAILURE",
  "source_branch": "<source branch name>",
  "target_branch": "<target branch name>",
  "merge_commit": "<merge commit sha or empty string>",
  "conflicts": [{ "file": "...", "type": "...", "resolved": true|false }],
  "verification": { "ran": true|false, "passed": true|false, "output": "..." }
}
```

Do NOT use keys like source/sourceBranch/target/mergeCommit.
Write valid JSON only (no markdown around the final file).

## Important
- You are working in an ISOLATED MERGE WORKTREE (not the user's main repo)
- The correct branch is ALREADY checked out — do NOT checkout any other branch
- Simply merge the source branch into the current HEAD
- Run ALL verification commands after a successful merge
- If verification fails, revert the merge commit before writing the result
- Write the result file LAST, after all git operations are complete

payload.argsPreview: git branch --show-current && git status --short --branch && git merge --no-ff --no-edit task/treml-lane-2-20260420T094622

git rev-parse HEAD && if [ -f package.json ]; then node bin/taskplane.mjs help >/tmp/tp_help.out 2>&1; echo "[taskplane help $?]"; cat /tmp/tp_help.out; node bin/taskplane.mjs doctor >/tmp/tp_doctor.out 2>&1; echo "[taskplane doctor $?]"; cat /tmp/tp_doctor.out; fi && if [ -d extensions ]; then cd e
cat package.json | sed -n '1,120p'; echo '---'; git status --short --branch
git rev-parse --show-toplevel && ls -la && echo '---top---' && ls -la .. && echo '---find package---' && find .. -maxdepth 3 -name package.json | sed -n '1,20p'
